creator: jhroyer@joher.com
text:
Since I upgraded from 3.0-release to 3.1-release natd stopped to work,
it still works well with packets without ports (ICMP : pings) but as
soon as you use TCP/UDP packets (telnet , nslookup) it doesn't get
any reply.

Ping/traceroute works perfectly but telnet/ftp or else is stucked.

I tried to run natd using -log -v but i didn't see any problem,
it seems that natd is doing his job but the kernel doesn't handle
the tcp/udp packets once unaliased.

I tried to fix it for 5 hours without succes, I tried every single
configuration/kernel without success ...
